rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ALBION NIXON TRUST (*****COTTAGE GROVE REVOCABLE TRUST TRANSFERRED TO SAN MATEO*****)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioners Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike, Or In The Alternative, Tax Costs Of Respondent Michael M. Dolan
rulings.Rulings: The motion to tax costs is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as to the following: Item 4: $11 for deposition costs. Item 5: $70 for the costs associated with service of process. Item 10: $32,722.50 for attorney's fees Item 11: $231.77 for costs associated with models, blowups, and photocopies of exhibits. Except as so granted, the motion is denied. The prevailing party shall prepare a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative ruling shall notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than 1/27/2015, at 4:00 p.m.
